title: Include severance in Ibrahim seat selection

log.context: Include severance in Ibrahim seat selection

Both services restarted cleanly. Here is a summary of every change made:

---

**serve.py** (`/home/clungus/work/hello-world/serve.py`) — 3 changes:

1. Added `AGENTS_FIRED_DIR` constant pointing to `agents/fired/`.

2. `_load_identity(name)` — now checks `AGENTS_ACTIVE_DIR` first, then falls back to `AGENTS_FIRED_DIR`. Previously a debate call for a severance persona would return 404 and crash the workflow.
